_comment: BWB park factors by team for VOS Evaluation
_comment_2: Team keys match config/bwb_orgs.json. Chihuahua Guerreros uses Pancho Villa Park OOTP data; remaining teams are neutral placeholders until team-specific park factors are entered

Boston Red Sox._comment: Park factors for Boston Red Sox (BWB) - VOS Evaluation
Boston Red Sox._comment_2: PLACEHOLDER: neutral 1.000 raw factors until OOTP park data is supplied
Boston Red Sox._comment_3: Each team should have its own park factors file (e.g., park-factors-{team-code}.json)

raw_park_factors._comment: Raw park factors from OOTP - 1.0 = league average

park_profile.description: Placeholder Park registers as a true neutral venue: batting average, extra-base hits, and home runs (overall and by handedness) all sit at league average until BWB-specific OOTP park data is entered for Boston Red Sox.
key_characteristics: Home runs league average overall and by hand (1.000)
No meaningful handedness asymmetry in the export

tool_adjustments._comment: Multipliers applied to tool ratings. 1.0 = no change, >1.0 = more valuable, <1.0 = less valuable
tool_adjustments._comment_2: All tools 1.0: conversion formulas on 1.000 raw factors yield no adjustment

defense._comment: Neutral park - baseline defensive tool weights

baserunning._rationale_Speed: No extra-base or run-environment tilt in the export
baserunning._rationale_Run: No extra-base or run-environment tilt in the export

pitcher_ability._comment: Neutral park - baseline pitcher tool weights

handedness_splits._comment_2: OOTP export is symmetric by handedness for these factors
handedness_splits._rationale: RHB and LHB HR factors identical at league average

application_rules._comment: Rules for when and how aggressively to apply these park factors
application_rules._comment_prospects: Apply to all players in Boston Red Sox organization, including minors
application_rules._comment_major_leaguers: Apply to players at ML level with this team
application_rules._comment_handedness: Disabled: no RHB/LHB HR difference in export
application_rules._comment_strength_2: At any strength, multipliers remain 1.0 while raw factors stay 1.000

usage_notes.creating_files_for_other_teams: Copy this team entry and adjust raw_park_factors and team_info sections
usage_notes.tuning_adjustment_strength: Start at 0.5, increase to 0.7-1.0 if you want more aggressive park effects

Chihuahua Guerreros._comment: Park factors for Chihuahua Guerreros (BWB) - VOS Evaluation
Chihuahua Guerreros._comment_2: Pancho Villa Park — outdoor, grass, capacity 55,002 (OOTP park factors)
Chihuahua Guerreros._comment_3: Each team should have its own park factors file (e.g., park-factors-{team-code}.json)

raw_park_factors._comment: Raw park factors from OOTP - 1.0 = league average

park_profile.description: Pancho Villa Park suppresses batting average, doubles, and triples while boosting home runs, with a moderate right-handed HR edge. Favor pull power and HR-limiting pitchers over gap-and-speed profiles.
key_characteristics: Moderate RHB vs LHB HR split (~7.8% relative)

tool_adjustments._comment: Multipliers applied to tool ratings. 1.0 = no change, >1.0 = more valuable, <1.0 = less valuable
tool_adjustments._comment_2: These are calculated from raw park factors using conversion formulas

defense._comment: Suppressed doubles/triples and lower average reduce range premiums versus spacious parks
defense._rationale_OFR: Heavy triples suppression lowers outfield range urgency
defense._rationale_IFR: Below-average batting average modestly reduces infield range opportunities

baserunning._comment: Low doubles/triples environment reduces speed and advancement value
baserunning._rationale_Speed: Suppressed extra-base hit rates reduce speed payoff on balls in play
baserunning._rationale_Run: Triples suppression reduces value of aggressive advancement

pitcher_ability._comment: HR-friendly profile increases value of HR prevention traits
pitcher_ability._rationale_Movement: Elevated HR factor raises premium on limiting aerial damage
pitcher_ability._rationale_Control: Slightly more important in higher-HR context
pitcher_ability._rationale_HR_Avoid: Park boosts HRs, increasing value of HR suppression skill

handedness_splits._comment: Optional handedness-specific adjustments - RHB HR 1.110 vs LHB HR 1.030 (~7.8% relative gap)
handedness_splits._comment_2: Moderate split — enabled for finer RHB/LHB power valuation
handedness_splits._rationale: Right-handed HR factor sits meaningfully above left-handed in an HR-boosting park

application_rules._comment: Rules for when and how aggressively to apply these park factors
application_rules._comment_prospects: Apply to all players in Chihuahua Guerreros organization, including minors
application_rules._comment_major_leaguers: Apply to players at ML level with this team
application_rules._comment_handedness: Enabled due to moderate RHB vs LHB HR gap
application_rules._comment_strength: Use 50% strength as conservative starting point. 1.0 = full strength, 0.5 = half strength
application_rules._comment_strength_2: At 0.5 strength: Pow becomes 1.024 instead of 1.049

usage_notes.creating_files_for_other_teams: Copy this team entry and adjust raw_park_factors and team_info sections
usage_notes.tuning_adjustment_strength: Start at 0.5, increase to 0.7-1.0 if you want more aggressive park effects
usage_notes.when_to_enable_handedness_splits: Already enabled — RHB/LHB HR factors differ by ~7.8%

baserunning._rationale_Speed: No extra-base or run-environment tilt in the export
baserunning._rationale_Run: No extra-base or run-environment tilt in the export

pitcher_ability._comment: Neutral park - baseline pitcher tool weights

handedness_splits._comment_2: OOTP export is symmetric by handedness for these factors
handedness_splits._rationale: RHB and LHB HR factors identical at league average

application_rules._comment: Rules for when and how aggressively to apply these park factors
application_rules._comment_prospects: Apply to all players in Philadelphia Phillies organization, including minors
application_rules._comment_major_leaguers: Apply to players at ML level with this team
application_rules._comment_handedness: Disabled: no RHB/LHB HR difference in export
application_rules._comment_strength_2: At any strength, multipliers remain 1.0 while raw factors stay 1.000
